## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss weekly sync scheduling, content automation, and publishing processes for Imubit and The Adventures Group.](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed to propose async meetings to clients, aiming for one sync per week](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Mapped out steps for content automation, including CMS field mapping and API integration](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Identified Abnormal as a potential first client for automated publishing due to their tech-savviness](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Discussed challenges with The Adventures Group's access restrictions and the need to build trust](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Meeting Schedule Optimization

  - [Proposed shifting to one client sync per week (Imubit or Abnormal)](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Plan to pitch async option to Tag on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Mariana open to weekly meetings if clients prefer, to avoid feeling "abandoned"](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Content Automation Progress

  - [Mariana working on updating reports and conducting AI mention/ranking analyses](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Collaborated with Tiandra on article publishing for The Adventures Group](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Need to map CMS fields for automation, regardless of the final process](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Mariana to document required CMS fields during next Adventures Group article publication](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Imubit Publishing Details

  - [Current output: \~5 editorial articles/week, 77 total published](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Mariana has API access for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Imubit considering CMS change from WordPress; seeking recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Single template used for all Imubit content (editorial blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### CMS and Automation Considerations

  - [Discussed potential CMS options (e.g., Webflow), but no specific recommendation yet](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [WordPress prioritized for automation due to client prevalence](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [API key likely the main requirement for automation setup](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Abnormal identified as ideal first client for automated publishing (tech-savvy, open to it, simple current process)](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### The Adventures Group (TAG) Automation

  - [Mariana to create field list for Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Some resistance from TAG regarding access; Mariana to discuss in upcoming call](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Team has built trust by managing topic selection and content review, accelerating processes](https://fathom.video/share/fXyouzEEGUadVFirsLU8VrbA_VWM2Fna?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
